para_name: # ADse-UFPM scenario input. Defines the climate forcing of a run:
#   var_ = stochastic climate variability and warming trend
# This file is merged into the parameter set by the run script. The model
# itself holds no climate-scenario values. Copy and edit to make your own.

detail: SD of annual temperature anomaly (degC)
SD of annual precipitation anomaly (fraction of mean)
Linear warming trend (degC/yr); 0 = stationary baseline
Extra invasive spread multiplier per degC above baseline
Annual canopy change per fractional precip anomaly
Negative precip anomaly beyond which canopy drought stress begins
Master switch for the disturbance module (1=on 0=off)
Annual additive rise in every event probability under warming (0=stationary)
Lower bound of uniform event-intensity draw
Upper bound of uniform event-intensity draw
Heatwave probability gain per unit climate-zone heat urgency
Drought probability gain per unit climate-zone drought stress
Pest probability gain per unit climate-zone invasive multiplier
Base annual probability of a heatwave event
Extra heatwave probability per degC positive temp anomaly
Canopy loss per unit heatwave intensity
Satisfaction loss per unit heatwave intensity
Base annual probability of a drought event
Extra drought probability per unit negative precip anomaly
Canopy loss per unit drought intensity
Native loss per unit drought intensity
Satisfaction loss per unit drought intensity
Base annual probability of an extreme rainfall/flood event
Extra rainfall-event probability per unit positive precip anomaly
Canopy loss per unit flood intensity
Cr penalty per unit flood intensity (infrastructure pressure)
Base annual probability of a storm-damage event
Canopy loss per unit storm intensity

Extra conflict probability per unit storm intensity
